Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Naseem Holdings Limited (ADGM SPV, Trade Licence TL-ADGM-7841) of a 22% strategic stake in Barq Renewables PJSC (ADX: BRQ, issuer) from Noor Oasis Investments LLC (Seller).
Purchase Price: AED 7.80 per share, representing a 19% premium to the 30-day VWAP; price, earn-out triggers, and indicative synergy ranges are non-public and constitute inside information under SCA/ADX rules.
Structure: Off-market block trade with post-closing registration; SCA substantial holdings notification and ADX acknowledgment required; no mandatory tender offer expected as stake remains below threshold, subject to SCA no-objection.
Timing/Disclosure: Target signing by 28 July 2026; issuer disclosure to ADX without delay upon SPA execution, or delayed disclosure permitted with SCA notification where immediate publication would prejudice legitimate interests.
Conditions Precedent: SCA no-objection; issuer board approval; no material adverse change; clean legal title; customary KYC; provision of management’s unaudited Q2 order book estimate (~14% YoY growth) solely for diligence—this is inside information and recipients are on a wall-crossed restricted list.
Blackout/Dealing Restrictions: Issuer is subject to ADX blackout starting 15 days before half-year results; no director/officer dealings; Buyer acknowledges selective disclosure controls and agrees to comply with SCA Market Conduct Regulations.
Public Reference: ADX announcement dated 12 Feb 2025 (Ref: ADX/BRQ/2025-019) regarding dividend policy and 2024 capacity expansion remains public and is not updated or supplemented by this term sheet.
Negative/Benign Note: Al Safwa Transport LLC’s relocation of its Sharjah warehouse last month is a routine third-party operational update and is not material to the issuer.
Financing: Buyer equity AED 180,000,000; bridge facility AED 90,000,000 from Amwaj Capital SPC (DIFC), secured over acquired shares and related distributions; no public offering of securities in the UAE.
Governance: One board seat for Buyer; information rights limited to prevent selective disclosure; any forecasts or guidance to be published via ADX prior to wider circulation.
PDPL/Data Handling: Parties will exchange KYC (including Emirates ID copy of signatories and trade licence extracts) for contractual necessity and legal obligation under UAE PDPL; data hosted in ADGM; no cross-border transfer without appropriate safeguards and UAE-compliant notices.
Exclusivity/Standstill: 45 days exclusivity; Buyer will not approach other shareholders or execute on-market purchases until ADX disclosure is made and blackout restrictions permit.
Break Fees: Seller break fee AED 6,000,000 if a superior proposal is accepted; reverse break fee AED 4,000,000 if Buyer fails to secure financing on agreed terms.
Contacts: Mr. Rami Al Najjar, Head of M&A, Naseem Holdings Limited, rami.alnajjar@naseemholdings.ae; Ms. Dalia Karim, Company Secretary, Barq Renewables PJSC, dalia.karim@barqrenewables.ae.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: DIFC law; DIFC Courts exclusive jurisdiction; bilingual (Arabic/English) execution copies to be prepared.
Binding Effect: Non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, costs, PDPL/data processing, and governing law; any announcement to be made via ADX in coordination with SCA and within applicable disclosure timing requirements.
